title: Cobblemon Forgotten Legends
description: This pack features a selection of quality-of-life and performance enhancements, alongside Cobblemon, an expansive Pokémon mod! It's highly optimized to run smoothly even on low-end hardware. We recommend allocating 4GB of RAM for the best experience.
body:
This pack features a selection of quality-of-life and performance enhancements, alongside Cobblemon, an expansive Pokémon mod! It's highly optimized to run smoothly even on low-end hardware. We recommend allocating 4GB of RAM for the best experience.

Discord: https://discord.gg/AYTsnkQEhu IP: play.cobblemonforgottenlegends.com


<details>
<summary>Server Features</summary>

- 6IV Starters
- Pokebuilder
- Breeding
- Wonder Trade System
- GTS (Grand Trading System from Pokemmo)
- Land Claims
- Server Block/Item Shop
- Bazaar
- Daycare
- TMs/Move Tutors
- Kits (Starter Kit for now)

</details>




<details>
<summary>QOL Mods</summary>

- 3D SKIN LAYERS
- APPLESKIN
- BOBBY
- SHADERS(BSL, COMPLEMENTARY)
- CAMERA UTILS
- CHAT HEADS
- COBBLEMON
- COBBLEMON MOVE INSPECTOR
- COBBLEMON FIGHT OR FLIGHT
- COBBLEMONRIDER
- COBBLEMON UI TWEAKS
- CONTINUITY
- CUT THROUGH
- EUPHOINIUM
- FALLING LEAVES
- INV MOVE
- JEI
- MORE CHAT HISTORY
- MOUSE TWEAKS
- NOT ENOUGH ANIMATIONS
- PRESENCE FOOTSTEPS
- PRISM
- SOUND PHYSICS REMASTERED
- XAERO'S MINIMAP
- XAERO'S WORLD MAP

</details>


<details>
<summary>Performance/Fixes Mods</summary>

Entity Culling
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Dynamic FPS
- Debugify
- FerriteCore
- Immediately Fast
- More Culling
- Auth Me
- Model Gap Fix

</details>



<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- Cobblemon Interface
- Kiece Cobblemon Minimap Icons(Built-in Server)

</details>
